query_intent: Across web, catalog, and store channels for Dec-1999, rank items by return-quantity ratio and return-currency ratio, and return rows that are top-10 on either ranking within each channel.

dag_nodes.intent: For each channel, left-join sales to returns, compute item-level quantity and value return ratios under profitability/volume constraints, rank items by both ratios, keep top-10 by either metric, and union channel outputs.
